ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the device */,
  "services" TEXT /* Services offered by the device */,
  "ips" TEXT /* IP addresses of the device */,
  "device_status" TEXT /* Status of the device (e.g., online, offline) */,
  "device_description" TEXT /* Description of the device */,
  "device_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was created */,
  "device_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the device was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the action was performed on */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., register, update location) */,
  "attribute" TEXT /* Attribute affected by the action (e.g., location, services) */,
  "tx_gas" INTEGER /* Transaction gas cost of the action */,
  "block_gas" INTEGER /* Block gas cost of the action */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time of the action */,
  "gas_price" INTEGER /* Gas price of the transaction */,
  "block_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the block the transaction was mined in */,
  "transaction_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_action_type FOREIGN KEY ("action_type") REFERENCES action_types ("action_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_attribute FOREIGN KEY ("attribute") REFERENCES attributes ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type (e.g., register, update location) */,
  "action_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the action type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., location, services) */,
  "attribute_description" TEXT /* Description of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "user_created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "user_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "user_action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action performed */,
  "action_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the device */,
  "location_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the location update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_locations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "service" TEXT /* Service offered by the device */,
  "service_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the service update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_services_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_ips" (
  "ip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each IP address */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "ip" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "ip_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the IP address update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_ips_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Log message */,
  "log_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "error_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the error entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_errors_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "config_key" TEXT /* Configuration key */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Configuration value */,
  "config_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the configuration update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_configurations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_firmware" (
  "firmware_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each firmware entry */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version */,
  "firmware_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the firmware update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("firmware_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_firmware_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)
